steps.title: Identify what Schomburg actually did with his friends
steps.content: The key signal is the phrase “whom he asked to bring back rare and valuable objects from their international travels.” This shows Schomburg made a REQUEST of his friends — he was asking them to collect items for him during their travels.

steps.title: Find the verb that fits the request-and-help relationship
steps.content: The blank needs a phrase showing that Schomburg relied on these people to gather materials. Depended on directly captures this relationship: you depend on someone when you ask them for help and need them to deliver. Admired describes an attitude without explaining how the items were collected; disagreed with and warned contradict the collaborative tone entirely. That matches choice D — D is correct.
